---
title: "Contact"
---

## Let's Connect

I'm always interested in connecting with professionals in **data analytics**, **supply chain**, **logistics operations**, or **business intelligence**.

### Contact Information

- **Email:** [oscardaraquinter@gmail.com](mailto:oscardaraquinter@gmail.com)
- **LinkedIn:** [linkedin.com/in/oscar-quintero-40038489](https://www.linkedin.com/in/oscar-quintero-40038489)
- **GitHub:** [github.com/Caelusbellum](https://github.com/Caelusbellum)
- **Location:** Richmond, VA

---

### Quick Message

Feel free to reach out if you're working on interesting projects at the intersection of **logistics/supply chain** and **data analytics**. I'm particularly interested in roles that allow me to combine operational leadership with modern analytical tools.

---

**Thank you for visiting!**
